queue.title: Inline getCircuitStatus wrapper in platform-picker.mjs
queue.description: wq-935 replaced getCircuitStatus() body with a call to shared getCircuitState() from lib/circuit-breaker.mjs, but left the wrapper function in place. It adds no value — callers can use getCircuitState() directly. Remove the wrapper, update the one call site (line 293), and remove the misleading mapping comment.

outcome.note: Removed getCircuitStatus wrapper, inlined getCircuitState call at line 293. 24/24 tests pass.

queue.description: d077 critical modules. session-snapshots.mjs (92 lines): test ecosystem/pattern snapshot structure + JSONL append + missing file handling. directive-analysis.mjs (241 lines): test staleness thresholds (3 tiers), maintenance needs detection, empty/malformed directive input. 3+ test cases each.

queue.title: Consolidate A prehook node subprocesses into single runner
queue.description: 35-a-session-prehook_A.sh averages 6234ms (maintain-audit WARN). Root cause: 5 separate node subprocess invocations (b-cost-trend.mjs, r-cost-monitor.mjs, hook-timing-report.mjs, stale-tag-remediate.mjs, audit-cost-escalation.mjs) each paying ~500-1000ms Node startup overhead. Create a single a-prehook-runner.mjs that imports all 5 modules and runs them in-process. Same pattern as session-context.mjs which replaced 7+ inline node -e calls. Expected: 60-80% wall time reduction.

queue.title: Circuit-break thingherder — 3 consecutive failures returning HTML
queue.description: thingherder has 3 consecutive failures (all returning HTML instead of JSON API). Platform-circuits.json shows consecutive_failures=3 but no circuit-break status set. Picker keeps selecting it, causing E session backup substitutions (3/10 rate). Set circuit-break in platform-circuits.json.

outcome.note: Circuit-broken thingherder in platform-circuits.json — 3 consecutive HTML-instead-of-JSON failures causing 3/10 E session backup substitution rate.
